title: Petrol, diesel price LIVE updates: Rijiju says fuel surge up to 100% in some countries, backs India's ‘limited increase’
description: Petrol, diesel price LIVE updates: In Delhi, petrol prices were hiked to ₹97.77 per litre from ₹94.77, while diesel rates increased to ₹90.67 per litre from ₹89.67.
